title: Songs of Origins
description: Integration between Origins and Songs of War
body:
# Songs of Origins This mod add origins for Songs of War. ## Added Origins | Origin | Impact | Advantages | Disadvantages | |:----------|:-------|:-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:--------------------------| | Ardoni | High | +10 Health
Use song ability
Invulnerable to potions | Cannot use redstone | | Felina | Medium | Can climb
Speed and jump boost
Invulnerable to fall | Afraid of water | | Magnorite | High | Invulnerable to fire, lava and fall
Faster in lava
+10 Defense | Very afraid of water&cold | | Netharan | Low | Invulnerable to fire | Afraid of water&cold | | Glacian | Medium | Invulnerable to powder snow
+5 Defense | Afraid of hot |
